examples: Be you really going to christen him, Tess?
Let's have a drink to christen our new sherry glasses.
Ben Bernanke has launched QE1 and QE2 and he may soon christen QE3 in the Federal Reserve's fleet.
This issue we christen another 200 Best Under a Billion companies, our go-to list of top-performing small and medium-size enterprises.
Spokeswoman Christen David said no other schedule changes have been made yet.
